title: content/units/unit-NN/bank.json — Content Schema v2 question bank (adaptive pool: authored difficulties, skills, parametric templates)
description: Optional per-unit growth surface for question volume beyond the curated quizzes.json banks. Items land in the lazily loaded QUIZ_DATA.pool[unitNumber] via ode/js/bank/bank-unit-NN.js chunks (dictionary-compressed at compile time; never loaded at boot). An item with params is a parametric template: the client instantiates it once per session by drawing each param uniformly from its integer range, evaluating derived expressions, and substituting {{name}} placeholders in every string field.

skills.description: Skill registry for the unit. Item skillIds must resolve here; skill ids seed the ode_skill_state Elo aggregates (telemetry.js).

modules.description: Curriculum module ids this skill maps to (validator checks unit prefix).

id.description: Globally unique, bk_<unitNumber>_<n>. Progress and telemetry key on this id; a parametric item keeps one id across instantiations.

difficulty.description: Authored two-sided Elo difficulty (telemetry.js DEFAULT_DIFFICULTY 1200 applies when absent).

params.description: Presence makes the item a parametric template. Each param is an inclusive integer range; step defaults to 1.

derived.description: Computed values available to placeholders. Arithmetic over params and earlier derived names: integers, + - * / ^, parentheses, unary minus. Evaluated by the bank loader's built-in evaluator (no Math.js dependency).

retiredIds.description: IDs burned by retired items, same contract as quizzes.json.
